Admission
Admission Events
Meet us in California!
Learn about and experience our community, innovative curriculum, and mission and values, by attending one or more of the following Admission Events. Use the event calendars below to select an event and register!
These events are intended for prospective families interested in learning more about Webb! All event times are listed in Pacific Time. Please contact
admission@webb.org
if you have any questions.
Loading...

2025–26
Application available now
Deadline to schedule an interview:
December 19, 2025
Application deadline:
January 15, 2026

January 15, 2026
Admission decisions released:
March 10, 2026
Enrollment decision deadline (day students):
March 27, 2026
Enrollment decision deadline (boarding students):
April 10, 2026
Meet the Webb Admission Team on the Road!
The Webb admission team is excited to connect with prospective students and families across the country throughout the fall season.
They will be visiting cities nationwide, hosting information sessions, attending school fairs, conducting interviews, and meeting with interested families to share what makes Webb truly exceptional. Check out the list below to find out when Webb will be in your area!
September 2025:
September 5-6 - Atlanta, Georgia
September 9 – Las Vegas, Nevada
September 10- Chicago, Illinois
September 12 – Newark, New Jersey
September 13- 14 – New York, New York
September 15 – San Francisco, California
September 18 – Far Hills, New Jersey

September 27 – Aspen, Colorado

NOTICE OF NONDISCRIMINATORY POLICY AS TO STUDENTS.
The Webb School admits students of any race, color, national and ethnic origin to all the rights, privileges, programs, and activities generally accorded or made available to students at the school. It does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national and ethnic origin in administration of its educational policies, admissions policies, scholarship and loan programs, and athletic and other school-administered programs.
